NWS.Alerts.Kafka.description: Kafka producer endpoint for NWS Alerts CloudEvents on the `nws-alerts` topic keyed by `{alert_id}`.

NWS.Alerts.Mqtt.description: MQTT 5 producer endpoint for NWS Alerts CloudEvents using the alert topic hierarchy and retain settings declared in this manifest.

NWS.Alerts.Amqp.description: AMQP producer endpoint for NWS Alerts CloudEvents on the `nws-alerts` address, using the same base CloudEvent contract as Kafka.

NWS.WeatherAlert.name: WeatherAlert
NWS.WeatherAlert.description: A weather or non-weather alert from the US National Weather Service, distributed through the Integrated Public Alert and Warning System (IPAWS). Follows the CAP (Common Alerting Protocol) standard.

NWS.Alerts.description: Events from NWS Alerts covering U.S. weather alert areas. Alert and incident records describe the current upstream hazard state and update when the provider changes that state.

NWS.Alerts.mqtt.description: MQTT 5 variant of the NWS Alerts events. It carries the same alert semantics as the base events with MQTT topic routing and retain behavior declared per message.

NWS.WeatherAlert.name: WeatherAlert
NWS.WeatherAlert.description: A weather or non-weather alert from the US National Weather Service (NWS/NOAA). Contains full CAP properties including severity, urgency, certainty, VTEC codes for event tracking, and UGC/SAME zone geocodes.

schema.name: WeatherAlert
schema.description: A weather or non-weather alert from the US National Weather Service, distributed through the Integrated Public Alert and Warning System (IPAWS). Follows the CAP (Common Alerting Protocol) standard.

alert_id.description: The unique URN-based identifier for the alert (e.g., 'urn:oid:2.49.0.1.840.0.xxx'). Stable across the lifecycle of the alert.

area_desc.description: A textual description of the affected geographic area (e.g., county names).

same_codes.description: Semicolon-separated SAME (Specific Area Message Encoding) codes identifying affected counties/zones. Used by the Emergency Alert System (EAS).

ugc_codes.description: Semicolon-separated UGC (Universal Geographic Code) zone identifiers (e.g., 'MDC031', 'TXZ001').

sent.description: The date and time when the alert was sent, in ISO-8601 format.

effective.description: The date and time when the alert becomes effective.

onset.description: The expected date and time of onset of the weather event.

expires.description: The date and time when the alert expires.

ends.description: The expected end time of the weather event.

descriptions.Actual: Provider value `Actual` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Exercise: Provider value `Exercise` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.System: Provider value `System` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Test: Provider value `Test` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Draft: Provider value `Draft` for this coded alert field.

descriptions.Alert: Provider value `Alert` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Update: Provider value `Update` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Cancel: Provider value `Cancel` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Ack: Provider value `Ack` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Error: Provider value `Error` for this coded alert field.

category.description: The CAP alert category (e.g., 'Met' for meteorological).

descriptions.Extreme: Provider value `Extreme` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Severe: Provider value `Severe` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Moderate: Provider value `Moderate` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Minor: Provider value `Minor` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Unknown: Provider value `Unknown` for this coded alert field.

descriptions.Observed: Provider value `Observed` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Likely: Provider value `Likely` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Possible: Provider value `Possible` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Unlikely: Provider value `Unlikely` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Unknown: Provider value `Unknown` for this coded alert field.

descriptions.Immediate: Provider value `Immediate` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Expected: Provider value `Expected` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Future: Provider value `Future` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Past: Provider value `Past` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Unknown: Provider value `Unknown` for this coded alert field.

event.description: The type of weather event (e.g., 'Tornado Warning', 'Flood Watch', 'Heat Advisory').

sender.description: The email address or identifier of the alert sender.

sender_name.description: The human-readable name of the sender (e.g., 'NWS Tulsa OK').

headline.description: A brief headline summarizing the alert.

description.description: The full textual description of the alert.

scope.description: The CAP scope of the alert.

nws_headline.description: The NWS-specific headline from the parameters block.

vtec.description: The P-VTEC (Valid Time Event Code) string for NWS event tracking.

web.description: A URL to the full alert details.

state.description: Lowercase USPS state or territory code enriched by the bridge from NWS UGC/SAME zone identifiers; nostate when no state can be resolved.

event_type.description: Lowercase kebab-case slug derived from the CAP event field for topic partitioning.

description: NWS Alerts publishes CAP weather watches, warnings, advisories, and updates from the U.S. National Weather Service for U.S. weather alert areas. These events help consumers monitor hazards, route notifications, and correlate public-warning updates without polling the upstream source directly.

documentation.description: Source documentation for NWS Alerts, including upstream feed context and bridge deployment notes.
